notes: Sessions 1-10 COMPLETE. Session 9: Device Inventory lifecycle (incoming→in_stock→assigned→installed), admin RLS, InventoryOverview + DeviceAssignment UI. Session 10: Production Glow visualization — 6,932 wells (oil+gas), 5 heatmap layers, zoom crossfade dots, HTML-escaped popups.

p0_completed.map_fly_to: Sidebar/list clicks trigger smooth map.flyTo animation
p0_completed.command_palette: Cmd+K instant well search with fuzzy matching, keyboard nav, recent wells
p0_completed.keyboard_shortcuts: Escape closes panels, ArrowUp/Down cycles wells with fly-to

features.operational_status: Watch/Warning/Well Down system with Supabase persistence + real-time sync
features.risk_overview: At-a-glance risk + op status dashboard in left sidebar
features.uwi_search: Command palette searches by UWI, shows op status badges
features.map_overlays: Parcel op-status fill layer + stroke cascade + legend
features.status_form: 3 toggle buttons + notes + pump change date range

features.device_inventory_table: Supabase table with admin-only RLS, CHECK constraints, partial unique index
features.lifecycle: incoming → in_stock → assigned → installed with timestamp tracking
features.inventory_overview: 4 colored counts in left sidebar (all users, admin gets Manage link)
features.device_assignment: RightPanel section for assigning devices to flagged wells

features.build_pipeline: CSV → GeoJSON (6,932 features, 3.32 MB), zero-production filtered
features.heatmap_layers: 5 layers: CW/BS oil (green/gold) + CW/BS gas (light green/light gold)
features.well_dots: Circle layer with zoom crossfade, 4-shade formation+fluid colors
features.popup: Gas/oil badge, fluid-type-aware colors, HTML-escaped fields
features.legend: 4 production glow entries + 3 well status entries
features.toggles: CW/BS buttons control both oil AND gas per formation
